requirement_topic.en: ENACOM Mandatory Homologación — Radio and Telecom Terminal Equipment Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: ENACOM强制型式认可——无线电及电信终端设备型号认证
requirement_topic.zht: ENACOM強制型式認可——無線電及電信終端裝置型號認證

summary.en: All radio-frequency-emitting devices and telecommunications terminal equipment — including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, cellular modules, and other intentional radiators — must obtain ENACOM homologación (mandatory type approval) before import or sale in Argentina. ENACOM is the Ente Nacional de Comunicaciones, the Argentine national communications regulator established under Ley Argentina Digital 27.078 (2014). Homologation requires product testing by INTI (Instituto Nacional de Tecnología Industrial) or another ENACOM-recognised laboratory. Upon approval, ENACOM assigns a unique homologation certificate number that must appear on the product label together with the ENACOM designation. CE, FCC, and CCC approvals are not recognised; separate ENACOM homologation is mandatory for every product model. Products sold or imported without a valid ENACOM certificate are subject to customs seizure and administrative penalties under Argentine telecommunications law. MERCOSUR bilateral recognition with Brazil for wireless equipment is incomplete and does not eliminate the need for ENACOM homologation.
summary.zh: 所有射频发射设备和电信终端设备——包括Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee、蜂窝模块及其他有意辐射体——在进口或于阿根廷销售前，必须取得ENACOM型式认可（强制型号认证）。ENACOM为阿根廷国家通信实体（Ente Nacional de Comunicaciones），是依据2014年阿根廷数字法27.078设立的阿根廷国家通信监管机构。型式认可需由INTI（阿根廷国家工业技术研究院）或ENACOM认可的其他实验室对产品进行检测。获批后，ENACOM分配唯一认可证书编号，须与ENACOM标识一并标注于产品标签。CE、FCC和CCC核准均不被承认；每个产品型号均须另行取得ENACOM型式认可。未持有效ENACOM证书销售或进口的产品，将依据阿根廷电信法面临海关扣押和行政处罚。阿根廷与巴西在无线设备方面的MERCOSUR双边相互认可机制尚不完善，无法免除ENACOM型式认可要求。
summary.zht: 所有射頻發射裝置和電信終端裝置——包括Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee、蜂巢模組及其他有意輻射體——在進口或於阿根廷銷售前，必須取得ENACOM型式認可（強制型號認證）。ENACOM為阿根廷國家通訊實體（Ente Nacional de Comunicaciones），是依據2014年阿根廷數位法27.078設立的阿根廷國家通訊監管機構。型式認可需由INTI（阿根廷國家工業技術研究院）或ENACOM認可的其他實驗室對產品進行檢測。獲批後，ENACOM分配唯一認可證書編號，須與ENACOM標識一併標注於產品標籤。CE、FCC和CCC核准均不被承認；每個產品型號均須另行取得ENACOM型式認可。未持有效ENACOM證書銷售或進口的產品，將依據阿根廷電信法面臨海關扣押和行政處罰。阿根廷與巴西在無線裝置方面的MERCOSUR雙邊相互認可機制尚不完善，無法免除ENACOM型式認可要求。

standards_or_laws: Ley Argentina Digital 27.078 (2014) — enabling legislation for ENACOM and mandatory homologation of radio and telecom terminal equipment
ENACOM Resoluciones and Disposiciones — product-specific homologation procedures, requirements, and certificate numbering
INTI (Instituto Nacional de Tecnología Industrial) — primary ENACOM-recognised testing body for homologation testing in Argentina

summary.en: In China, radio transmitters including Wi-Fi and Bluetooth modules are subject to SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China, now NRA) type approval administered by MIIT before import or sale. Terminal equipment such as routers and connected IoT devices may also require a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). Chinese approvals are based on GB radio standards and Chinese frequency allocations. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) may also apply for certain in-scope radio and electrical products. These Chinese approvals are not recognised by ENACOM; Argentina requires a completely separate homologation process.
summary.zh: 在中国，包括Wi-Fi和蓝牙模块在内的无线电发射设备，须在进口或销售前经工业和信息化部（MIIT）管理的国家无线电管理局（原SRRC，现NRA）型号核准。路由器和联网物联网设备等终端设备还可能需要工业和信息化部（MIIT）颁发的进网许可证（NAL）。中国核准基于GB无线电标准和中国频率划分。部分范围内的无线电和电气产品还可能需要CCC（中国强制认证）。上述中国核准不被ENACOM承认；阿根廷要求进行完全独立的型式认可程序。
summary.zht: 在中國，包括Wi-Fi和藍牙模組在內的無線電發射裝置，須在進口或銷售前經工業和信息化部（MIIT）管理的國家無線電管理局（原SRRC，現NRA）型號核准。路由器和聯網物聯網裝置等終端設備還可能需要工業和信息化部（MIIT）頒發的進網許可證（NAL）。中國核准基於GB無線電標準和中國頻率劃分。部分範圍內的無線電和電氣產品還可能需要CCC（中國強制認證）。上述中國核准不被ENACOM承認；阿根廷要求進行完全獨立的型式認可程序。

standards_or_laws: SRRC/NRA Type Approval — mandatory pre-market radio transmitter approval in China under MIIT
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — mandatory for terminal equipment connecting to public networks in China
GB 15629.11 and related WLAN/radio technical standards — China-specific radio test standards
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory for certain in-scope radio and electrical products sold in China

gap.en: Chinese SRRC/NRA type approval, MIIT NAL, and CCC certification are not recognised by ENACOM and do not satisfy Argentine homologation requirements. A separate ENACOM homologación must be obtained — through INTI or another ENACOM-recognised laboratory — before the product may be imported or sold in Argentina. The ENACOM certificate number must appear on the product label. Spanish-language labelling is required. There is no mutual recognition or equivalence pathway between ENACOM and FCC, CE, CCC, or ANATEL (Brazil) frameworks for wireless devices. MERCOSUR does not currently bridge this gap for radio equipment.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC/NRA型号核准、MIIT进网许可证和CCC认证不被ENACOM承认，不满足阿根廷型式认可要求。在阿根廷进口或销售产品前，须通过INTI或ENACOM认可的其他实验室另行取得ENACOM型式认可。ENACOM证书编号须标注于产品标签。须使用西班牙语标签。ENACOM与FCC、CE、CCC或ANATEL（巴西）框架之间，对无线设备无相互认可或等效路径。MERCOSUR目前未就无线电设备填补这一差距。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC/NRA型號核准、MIIT進網許可證和CCC認證不被ENACOM承認，不滿足阿根廷型式認可要求。在阿根廷進口或銷售產品前，須通過INTI或ENACOM認可的其他實驗室另行取得ENACOM型式認可。ENACOM證書編號須標注於產品標籤。須使用西班牙語標籤。ENACOM與FCC、CE、CCC或ANATEL（巴西）框架之間，對無線裝置無相互認可或等效路徑。MERCOSUR目前未就無線電裝置填補這一差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ENACOM homologación required for all RF-emitting and telecom terminal equipment before import or sale in Argentina under Ley Argentina Digital 27.078; non-compliant devices subject to customs seizure and penalties
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC/NRA type approval required for radio transmitters; MIIT NAL required for terminal equipment connecting to public networks in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Argentina requires ENACOM mandatory homologación for all RF-emitting wireless and telecom terminal equipment before import or sale under Ley Argentina Digital 27.078. Chinese SRRC, CCC, FCC, and CE approvals are not recognised. Testing must be conducted by INTI or an ENACOM-recognised laboratory, and the ENACOM homologation number must appear on the Spanish-language product label. MERCOSUR does not bridge the homologation gap for wireless equipment. Verify current ENACOM procedures, applicable disposiciones, and laboratory accreditation with a qualified Argentine regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据阿根廷数字法27.078，阿根廷要求所有射频发射无线电及电信终端设备在进口或销售前取得ENACOM强制型式认可。中国SRRC、CCC、FCC和CE核准均不被承认。检测须由INTI或ENACOM认可的实验室进行，且ENACOM认可编号须标注于西班牙语产品标签上。MERCOSUR未填补无线设备的型式认可差距。请向合格的阿根廷监管专业人士核验现行ENACOM程序、适用处置规定和实验室认可状态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據阿根廷數位法27.078，阿根廷要求所有射頻發射無線電及電信終端裝置在進口或銷售前取得ENACOM強制型式認可。中國SRRC、CCC、FCC和CE核准均不被承認。檢測須由INTI或ENACOM認可的實驗室進行，且ENACOM認可編號須標注於西班牙語產品標籤上。MERCOSUR未填補無線裝置的型式認可差距。請向合格的阿根廷監管專業人士核驗現行ENACOM程序、適用處置規定和實驗室認可狀態。
